observations.archetype_gloss: Desperate man seeking escape from burden
observations.summary: Aviel expresses a manic, desperate desire to leave and cast off his burden, indicating a projection of his inner Shadow seeking escape from his psychological weight.

evidence.quote: "Don't you see?" Aviel's voice rose, gaining that manic edge Dan had learned to recognize—the sound of a desperate man who thinks he's found an escape route. "It's a sign! The vision was telling me—telling *me*—that I need to leave. To cast off this burden. This house. All of it."
